speaker: ARTEMIDORUS
text: Here will I stand till Caesar pass along,

speaker: ARTEMIDORUS
text: And as a suitor will I give him this.

speaker: ARTEMIDORUS
text: My heart laments that virtue cannot live

speaker: ARTEMIDORUS
text: Out of the teeth of emulation.

speaker: ARTEMIDORUS
text: If thou read this, O Caesar, thou mayest live;

speaker: ARTEMIDORUS
text: If not, the Fates with traitors do contrive.
